source_pr.title: planner,tests: migrate part of planner tests to mysql_tester
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #47199

Problem Summary:

As stated in https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/45961, I'll migrate most of the tests using "CreateMockStore"/testkit to `mysql_tester`, as it can reduce the consumption of recreating TiDB environment for every tests.

### What is changed and how it works?

Auto generate the test, and manually verify the codes to check whether they are proper to test in `mysql_tester`. I also removed some data from the `json` test data, but some format may changed (as my script to remove the data according to the removed tests will automatically format the json... ).

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [x] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->  

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: - // Default RPC encoding may cause statistics explain result differ and then the test unstable.
failure_signature: - // Default RPC encoding may cause statistics explain result differ and then the test unstable.
fix_pattern: - // Default RPC encoding may cause statistics explain result differ and then the test unstable.
